problem: How many ways can change be made for a quarter using standard U.S. coins?  (Don't count "1 quarter" as making change for a quarter.)

classified_questions.question: What are the standard U.S. coins and what are their values?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many cents are in a quarter?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why did we break down the quarter into five 5-cent blocks?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How many ways can we fill one 5-cent block using standard U.S. coins?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What are the possible cases based on how many dimes we use?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many ways can we fill up the remaining block if we have two dimes?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many ways can we fill up the remaining three blocks if we have one dime?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many ways can we fill up five blocks if we have no dimes?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How do we calculate the total number of ways?
classified_questions.label: b
